# third_party

This directory stores external source repositories used as references or reused
code.

Expected repositories:

- `taichi_LBM3D`: https://github.com/yjhp1016/taichi_LBM3D
- `taichi_mpm`: https://github.com/yuanming-hu/taichi_mpm

Do not modify files inside `third_party` directly. Adapted code should be copied
into `fsi/` with license notices preserved.
